rows.label: qev011201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Um, this is sudden, but...
Do you have any interest in the ecosystem of this planet?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'm sorry... It really is sudden, isn't it.
But it's not some kind of recruitment.
I'm just looking for a supporter... or rather, a collaborator...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_JNK0010
rows.name: Listen

rows.label: qev011201_SEL0011
rows.name: Say you are interested in the ecosystem.

rows.label: qev011201_JNK0020
rows.name: Ignore

rows.label: qev011201_SEL0021
rows.name: Say you have no interest in academic topics.

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Thank you!
You're the first person I've met who showed
any interest in what I have to say![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Ah, in that case, even if you can't be a supporter,
would you mind listening to this as a job request?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0005
rows.name:
Of course, it's entirely up to you
whether you accept the request or not.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0006
rows.name: Please... just hear me out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0007
rows.name: I'm Sullivan, a botanist.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0008
rows.name:
Ever since landing on this planet Mira,
I've been tasked with analyzing creatures and plants
that look like they came straight out of a fantasy novel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0009
rows.name: To be honest, the sheer diversity makes me dizzy every day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0010
rows.name:
I've been painfully reminded that the doctorate I earned on Earth
is practically just a piece of paper here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0011
rows.name:
However, I won't give up.
My thirst for the unknown won't be stopped by hardships like—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0012
rows.name:
Ah, I'm so sorry!
I ended up talking all about myself...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0013
rows.name:
To reiterate my request...
Could you help me with my research a little?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0014
rows.name:
There's a large forest to the west of NLA,
and it's supposedly home to many plants
you'd never find on Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0015
rows.name:
I heard that a marshland deep inside it has
some particularly valuable samples academically speaking...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0016
rows.name:
They say finding them won't be easy,
but I'd like to ask you to collect them for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0017
rows.name:
Ideally, I need three...
One for preservation, one for research, and one for display.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0018
rows.name:
To unravel the mysteries of Mira's ecosystem,
and for the further development of human knowledge...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0019
rows.name: Please, lend me your strength.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0020
rows.name:
My interest in the ecosystem of this planet is endless.
Even if it takes my entire life,
I will completely analyze all its mysteries![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0021
rows.name:
We don't have enough plant samples for experiments.
Ah, if only I could go out and collect them myself![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0022
rows.name:
Mira is in a sense a paradise for researchers like me.
It's a treasure trove of fascinating samples, after all...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0023
rows.name:
Ah, hello...
How is your progress so far?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0024
rows.name:
This is...!
Thank you, these are high-quality samples![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0025
rows.name:
But... how should I put this...
This is truly fascinating...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0026
rows.name: I can't say anything definitive before examining it in detail, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0027
rows.name:
There's a possibility that the main body of the plant
these samples came from exists independently
from all ecological chains.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0028
rows.name:
I'd heard the rumors, but...
My goodness, this is simply wonderful...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0029
rows.name: The ecosystem of this planet is truly full of wonders![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0030
rows.name: So, um... This is very difficult to say, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0031
rows.name:
If possible... or rather, I really must ask you
to gather samples for me one more time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0032
rows.name:
There's a place where the water flows out from the marshland
and forms a river...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0033
rows.name:
I heard that the riverbed is covered with
another highly valuable type of seed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0034
rows.name:
By analyzing Mira's ecosystem,
we can push the development of botany to a whole new stage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0035
rows.name:
For preservation, research, display, new recruit training,
sponsor presentations, and gifts...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0036
rows.name: Please collect a total of six samples for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0037
rows.name:
This is all for the future of academics, of course.
I humbly beg of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0038
rows.name:
Plant reproduction is an issue directly tied to our survival...
People's apathy towards it will eventually become a grave problem
that falls back on us all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0040
rows.name:
Welcome back!
Judging by your look, can I expect good results?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0041
rows.name: Ahh, this is exactly what I was looking for![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0042
rows.name:
Ah, no, no.
I meant it's exactly what was required academically, of course.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0043
rows.name:
And to think you really collected all of them...
For preservation, research, display, training,
sponsor presentations, and gifts...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0044
rows.name:
Thank you so very much.
You have contributed deeply to the development of botany.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0045
rows.name:
This act of yours might not be recorded in the documents...
But the results of the research will be left for future generations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0046
rows.name: Please have confidence that this was an exploration to be proud of.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0047
rows.name:
Oh, right.
I just finished analyzing the samples you collected
for me the other day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0048
rows.name:
Surprisingly, that plant alters its body at a cellular level
between morning and night, transforming into
something completely different.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0049
rows.name:
At this point, rather than calling it a plant...
It might be better to classify it as
a single lifeform.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0050
rows.name:
Truly... everything on this planet Mira seems to exist
outside the bounds of our common sense.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0051
rows.name:
Thank you so much for taking on
such a difficult request this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0052
rows.name:
I'll be relying on your help again
when I need more samples, alright?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0053
rows.name:
For preservation, research, display, new recruit training,
sponsor presentations, gifts, and also...
For pets, missionary work, and contest prizes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011201_MSG0054
rows.name:
I'm constantly in need of
a large amount of samples, after all...![ST:wait ]
